description: Specify the energy tracking state. Currently only mechanical energies can be tracked.

keywords.name: all
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of all processes to b .

keywords.name: cfd
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of the cfd process to b .

keywords.name: creep
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of the creep process to b .

keywords.name: dynamic
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of the dynamic process to b .

keywords.name: mechanical
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of the mechanical process to b .

keywords.name: thermal
keywords.description: Set the energy tracking state of the thermal process to b .

keywords.name: mechanical
keywords.description: Specify the energy tracking state for the mechanical process.

keywords.name: mechanical
keywords.description: Specify the energy tracking state for the mechanical process.
